AZURE_HADOOP_CLOUD_CLIENT.name: azure_storage_connectivity
AZURE_HADOOP_CLOUD_CLIENT.label: Azure Storage Connectivity
AZURE_HADOOP_CLOUD_CLIENT.description: Checks if the configured Azure storage backend is reachable via HDFS commands.

AZURE_HADOOP_CLOUD_CLIENT.name: azure_credential_expiry
AZURE_HADOOP_CLOUD_CLIENT.label: Azure Credential Expiry
AZURE_HADOOP_CLOUD_CLIENT.description: Warns if Azure credentials (SAS token, OAuth token) are nearing expiration.

AZURE_HADOOP_CLOUD_CLIENT.name: hadoop_azure_jar_present
AZURE_HADOOP_CLOUD_CLIENT.label: Hadoop Azure JAR Present
AZURE_HADOOP_CLOUD_CLIENT.description: Checks that hadoop-azure and azure-storage JARs are on the Hadoop classpath.
